name: claude-codex-bridge
description: Local bridge workflow for auditing Claude Code work in Codex and sending Codex feedback back to Claude.

interface.shortDescription: Audit Claude work in Codex and send feedback back.
interface.longDescription: Adds a Codex skill for reading Claude Code handoff files, producing findings-first audits, and forwarding the resulting feedback back to Claude through the local agent bridge.
defaultPrompt: Send this feedback back to Claude
